label: Grow Guide — Add to your Shed alongside tasks
items: When you tap Add to Calendar on a plant in The Library that isn't already in your Shed, the sheet now asks: "Also add {plant} to your Shed?" — defaults to yes.
Tapping Add then saves the plant to your Shed AND drops the tasks onto your calendar in one go. Tasks for a plant you don't own no longer feel orphaned.

Also fixed: the instance picker for plants already in your Shed now correctly matches by source / provider id (instead of failing on the catalogue id mismatch) — so Roma in the back bed shows up in the dropdown.
